---
title: "Title (TBD)"
author: "Fred J. Hickernell"
subtitle: |
  Illinois Institute of Technology, hickernell@illinoistech.edu

  Joint work with ??? <span class="pkg">qmcpy</span> development team

  Supported in part by NSF-DMS-2316011 &nbsp; &nbsp;  ·  &nbsp; &nbsp; Thanks to the organizers

  Monte Carlo and Quasi-Monte Carlo Methods 2026 (MCQMC26), Edinburgh

  🔗 Slides: fjhickernell.github.io/MCQMC26/slides/MCQMC26.html

date: 2026-06-08
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"

metadata-files:
  - ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/research/research-slides.yml

execute:
  echo: false

format:
  revealjs:
    code-overflow: wrap
---

# First line
